job_id.description: Id of the job this attribute belongs to. Each job has its own set of `job_candidate_attributes`; there is no org-wide attribute list.

candidate_attribute_type_id.description: Id of the parent `candidate_attribute_type` this row is an instance of. The same `candidate_attribute_type` can appear on many jobs, but each pairing of job and type has at most one `job_candidate_attribute`.

active.description: `true` when the attribute is in use on the job; `false` after it has been archived from the job's attribute list. Defaults to `true`.

sort_order.description: Display priority within the job's attribute list. Lower values sort first. `null` until a user manually reorders the attributes in the Greenhouse UI — newly added attributes have no explicit sort_order.

name.description: Display name of the attribute on this job (e.g. `JavaScript`, `Leadership`). Sourced from the parent `candidate_attribute_type` at creation time and can be edited per job.

description: Schema for the 'job_candidate_attributes' stream, linked to the '/v3/job_candidate_attributes' endpoint.
